title: rename flux + zimage provider from vast.ai to runpod; reclassify runpod+lambda as free GPU
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Freeing the GPUs
gist.blurb: We've moved our Flux and Zimage models to new infrastructure, officially classifying them under our free GPU tier. Just some behind-the-scenes gardening to keep the hive running smoothly!
gist.summary: Migrated the flux and zimage image models from vast.ai to runpod, updating internal Grafana dashboards to classify runpod and lambda as free GPU infrastructure.
gist.impact: This internal change optimizes our infrastructure costs and updates our monitoring tools, ensuring sustainable free-tier generation for the community.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and a monitor robot organizing server racks, moving glowing GPU blocks from a 'paid' box to a 'free' box. A cute monitor robot holding a chart showing flat costs.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot moving glowing lime green (#ecf874) server blocks into a wooden crate. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
